scripts.check:jsx: tsc --noEmit --allowJs --jsx preserve --target es2020 --module esnext --noResolve --skipLibCheck app/home.js app/components/kit.js "app/p/[id]/page.js" app/components/MapView.js "app/l/[key]/page.js"
scripts.prebuild: npm run check:version && npm run check:jsx && npm run check:dupes && npm run check:env && node scripts/test-tags.mjs && node scripts/check-libs.mjs && npm run check:gate && npm run check:seo && node scripts/check-guides.mjs && node scripts/test-affiliates.mjs && node scripts/check-legal.mjs
scripts.audit:regression: npm run test:e2e && npm run check:bundle && node scripts/check-headers.mjs
